---
title: "Etienne Camara"
description: "Cross-League · Central Midfielder · BEL1 → GRE1"
date: "2026-07-10"
categories: [Central Midfielder, Reliable-Starter, Cross-League]
---

```{=html}
<div class="scout-card-container">

  <h3>📊 Transfer Assessment <code>[CROSS-LEAGUE]</code></h3>

  <table>
    <thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Detail</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td><strong>Player</strong></td><td>ETIENNE CAMARA</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Position</strong></td><td>Central Midfielder</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Route</strong></td>
        <td><span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.78rem;">BEL1 <span style="color:#4A9EFF;margin:0 0.4rem;">→</span> GRE1</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Season</strong></td><td><em>25/26</em></td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <div style="padding:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;padding:0 1.4rem 0.6rem;">
      Per-Metric Percentile (GRE1)
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Blocking</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:94%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">94.1%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">LongBalls</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:71%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">70.7%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Passing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:69%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">68.6%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Tackling</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:68%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">68.2%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Dribbling</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:59%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">59.0%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Creativity</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:55%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">55.2%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Scoring</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:46%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">46.0%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Crossing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:44%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">43.5%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">ShotAcc</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:43%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">43.1%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Assisting</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:40%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">39.7%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Progression</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:27%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">26.8%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Pressing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:25%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">24.7%</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="profile-strengths">
    <strong>✦ Strengths ≥ 60th pct</strong>
    Blocking (94%) · LongBalls (71%) · Passing (69%) · Tackling (68%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-neutral">
    <strong>◈ Neutral 40–59th pct</strong>
    Dribbling (59%) · Creativity (55%) · Scoring (46%) · Crossing (44%) · ShotAcc (43%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-risks">
    <strong>▼ Risks &lt; 40th pct</strong>
    Assisting (40%) · Progression (27%) · Pressing (25%)
  </div>

  <div class="verdict-block">
    <div class="verdict-label">Overall Projection</div>
    <div class="verdict-tier">Reliable Starter</div>
    <div class="verdict-pct">avg pct: 53.3% · P(success) 75% · Cross-League · BEL1 → GRE1</div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-footnote">
    <span class="card-footnote-marker">*</span>
    <span class="card-footnote-text">
      <strong>Comparison group:</strong> Central Midfielders in GRE1 only &mdash; not other positions or leagues. &middot;
      <strong>Data window:</strong> Player scores are from their most recent season only, not a career average. &middot;
      <strong>Outside scope:</strong> Injury history, tactical system fit, and contract terms are not captured by this model.
    </span>
  </div>

</div>
```
